features.description: Fixed bug where focus time and sessions count weren't updating due to RLS restriction in edge worker REST fallback and missing fields in DataSyncContext cache.

features.description: Unified premium, pulsing, glassmorphic Mana Pill dropdown trigger in the top-right header. Fixed infinite loading spinner on empty TagAnalyticsWidget and added full multi-user friend analytics support.

features.title: Discord RPC integration & 0-cost Production Planning
